mapper.sql: id , tenant_id, config_key, config_name, value_type, encrypted, config_group, description, status, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, config_value
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from sys_config
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_config (tenant_id, config_key, config_name, value_type, encrypted, config_group, description, status, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, config_value) values (#{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{configKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{configName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{valueType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{encrypted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{configGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{configValue,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into sys_config
tenant_id,
config_key,
config_name,
value_type,
encrypted,
config_group,
description,
status,
version,
delete_marker,
create_by,
create_time,
update_by,
update_time,
config_value,
#{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{configKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{configName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{valueType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{encrypted,jdbcType=BIT},
#{configGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{configValue,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update sys_config
id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
config_key = #{row.configKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
config_name = #{row.configName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
value_type = #{row.valueType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
encrypted = #{row.encrypted,jdbcType=BIT},
config_group = #{row.configGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{row.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
config_value = #{row.configValue,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update sys_config set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, config_key = #{row.configKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, config_name = #{row.configName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, value_type = #{row.valueType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, encrypted = #{row.encrypted,jdbcType=BIT}, config_group = #{row.configGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{row.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, config_value = #{row.configValue,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update sys_config
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
config_key = #{configKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
config_name = #{configName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
value_type = #{valueType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
encrypted = #{encrypted,jdbcType=BIT},
config_group = #{configGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
config_value = #{configValue,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sys_config set tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, config_key = #{configKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, config_name = #{configName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, value_type = #{valueType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, encrypted = #{encrypted,jdbcType=BIT}, config_group = #{configGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, config_value = #{configValue,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
